reviews.review_description: My friend made this game and gave me moderator!
The game is super well done and creative. The cosmetics are good and they also did a collab with smore runners. Overall this game is a 10/10.

reviews.review_title: Just some ideas for the game
reviews.review_description: It's a great game but I feel like you could add public lobbies to the game. Also adding colors would be awesome. And a bug I found is you type two letters, can you fix it? Anyways besides that the game is AMAZING.

developer_response.body: I'll work on it. Thanks for the feedback. Also, public lobbies are in the game. All you need to do is step out of the door way.

reviews.review_description: This game is very well made. It needs more maps, which I know you'll get to that. It's a little laggy but very little.I love your game, so don't be worried that I don't like it because I put 4 stars.
W game cosmetics good and yeah not buggy
